notes: SHIP v1.14.345 - GHOST IS THE DOOR / Q1 fix: the assistant doors now land on the four-door A-2 intent menu explicitly. BUG: the .344 card door + the .337 desktop CHAT button both called openVaSheet() with NO argument -> setVaBody(undefined) matches none of its branches (listening/intent/composer/thinking, and there is NO else) -> #vaBody.innerHTML is never set -> the sheet opened BLANK on first open (or stale after), NOT the intent menu. rd-reviewer PASSED .344 by verifying the door EXISTS, not what it RENDERS - that was the gap. FIX: openVaSheet() -> openVaSheet('intent') at the 2 bare call sites only (#cc-asst card ~L13058, #cc-chat desktop button ~L13094). The CHAT chip is decorative aria-hidden and bubbles to the card (not a call site). All arg'd call sites left untouched: .qa-voice 'listening'+vaStart (the legit voice gesture), the keyword-router 'intent'/'listening', and 'thinking'. Scope of SHIP-GHOST-IS-THE-DOOR.md collapsed to its section 3.1 ONLY after recon vs live head: 3.2 VOID (#hdr-ghost-btn sits inside #hdr-overflow-wrap which is display:none !important under body.rd since .156 - the header ghost is already dead in the redesign, do not patch a hidden element), 3.3 VOID+stale-premise (live .qa-ghost L13304 calls geOpen()/Ghost Echo, NOT openVaSheet('listening') - there is no surprise-mic fault; re-routing it as the spec directs would BREAK Ghost Echo), 3.4 already shipped in .344 (the .cc-asst:active pressed state). No va_* functions, ask pipeline, ticket handling, or #vaSheet internals touched - the room was finished, only the doorplate arg was wrong. #pg-cmd / body.rd-scoped -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical. Gates: inline-JS vm.Script x3, CSS brace net-0 (JS-only change), three-stamp .344->.345; phantom-ship-gate + phantom-rd-reviewer pre-commit. Joins the .340-.345 batch device-verify and SUPERSEDES the known-broken .344 door (BATCH-VERIFY.md updated). DEVICE-VERIFY (clear SW first): tap the AI ASSISTANT card (and, on desktop, CHAT WITH PHANTOM) -> the FOUR-DOOR intent menu (SPEAK / PASTE TICKET / TYPE OR PASTE / IMPORT FILE) opens EVERY time, never blank; SPEAK remains the only control that starts the mic. NEXT = MASTER FULL-INGEST Phase 2 (SITE-VARS fill) once the batch releases. ROLLBACK: revert this commit.
